nasb.text: “This day the Lord your God commands you to do these statutes and ordinances. You shall therefore be careful to do them with all your heart and with all your soul.

esv.text: “This day the Lord your God commands you to do these statutes and rules. You shall therefore be careful to do them with all your heart and with all your soul.

cnv.text: “耶和華你的　神今日吩咐你遵行這些律例和典章，所以你要一心一意謹守遵行。

ccb.text: “你们的上帝耶和华今天吩咐你们遵守这些律例和典章，你们要全心全意地谨慎遵守。
